dictionary_sections.definition: EID_0169 Equation Source is a source-backed Opera Omnia registry packet centered on the canonical relation \\Phi(\theta,\\phi) = \\sum_{i=1}^N \\frac{A_i}{\\cosh(\\alpha d_i)} \. It identifies the mathematical spine of the cited chapter and gives the entry a concrete equation, symbol key, and derivation chain for the four-page production layout.

dictionary_sections.derivable_consequences: The equation progression records \\Phi(\theta,\\phi) = \\sum_{i=1}^N \\frac{A_i}{\\cosh(\\alpha d_i)} \; \r \\widehat{H}_{\\mathrm{cym}}\r =\r \\int \\rho(r,t)\\,\r J_{n}(k r)\\, e^{\\mathrm{i} (n\\phi - \\omega t)}\\,\r \\mathrm{d}^{3}r,\r \; \r \\widehat{H}_{\\mathrm{TZP}}\r =\r \\delta(r - r_{0})\\,\r \\lvert \\mathrm{TZP} \\rangle\r \\langle \\mathrm{TZP} \\rvert\r \\otimes\r \\bigl(\r \\widehat{\\mathcal{E}}_{\\mathrm{ZPE}}\r \\cdot\r \\widehat{\\mathcal{C}}_{\\mathrm{dim}}\r \\cdot\r \\partial_{t}^{\\infty}\r \\bigr),\r \; \r \\frac{\\partial \\rho}{\\partial t}\r =\r - \\frac{\\mathrm{i}}{\\hbar}\r \\bigl[\r \\widehat{H}_{\\mathrm{Trawin}}, \\rho\r \\bigr]\r +\r \\sum_{k} \\gamma_{k}\r \\left(\r L_{k} \\rho L_{k}^{\\dagger}\r -\r \\frac{1}{2}\r \\bigl\\{\r L_{k}^{\\dagger} L_{k}, \\rho\r \\bigr\\}\r \\right),\r \. These relations give the support page enough structure to show how the canonical formula arises from nearby source material rather than from a disconnected title alone.

derivation_layer.source_latex:
% BEGIN TZP DERIVATION LAYER
\tzpsection{Derivation Layer}
\begin{enumerate}[leftmargin=1.6em,itemsep=7pt,topsep=4pt]
\item
\[
\\Phi(\theta,\\phi) = \\sum_{i=1}^N \\frac{A_i}{\\cosh(\\alpha d_i)} \
\]
This line is the 1 source equation retained from dialogue\_clean.md for the EID\_0169 Equation Source packet.
\item
\[
\r \\widehat{H}_{\\mathrm{cym}}\r =\r \\int \\rho(r,t)\\,\r J_{n}(k r)\\, e^{\\mathrm{i} (n\\phi - \\omega t)}\\,\r \\mathrm{d}^{3}r,\r \
\]
This line is the 2 source equation retained from dialogue\_clean.md for the EID\_0169 Equation Source packet.
\item
\[
\r \\widehat{H}_{\\mathrm{TZP}}\r =\r \\delta(r - r_{0})\\,\r \\lvert \\mathrm{TZP} \\rangle\r \\langle \\mathrm{TZP} \\rvert\r \\otimes\r \\bigl(\r \\widehat{\\mathcal{E}}_{\\mathrm{ZPE}}\r \\cdot\r \\widehat{\\mathcal{C}}_{\\mathrm{dim}}\r \\cdot\r \\partial_{t}^{\\infty}\r \\bigr),\r \
\]
This line is the 3 source equation retained from dialogue\_clean.md for the EID\_0169 Equation Source packet.
\item
\[
\r \\frac{\\partial \\rho}{\\partial t}\r =\r - \\frac{\\mathrm{i}}{\\hbar}\r \\bigl[\r \\widehat{H}_{\\mathrm{Trawin}}, \\rho\r \\bigr]\r +\r \\sum_{k} \\gamma_{k}\r \\left(\r L_{k} \\rho L_{k}^{\\dagger}\r -\r \\frac{1}{2}\r \\bigl\\{\r L_{k}^{\\dagger} L_{k}, \\rho\r \\bigr\\}\r \\right),\r \
\]
This line is the 4 source equation retained from dialogue\_clean.md for the EID\_0169 Equation Source packet.
\item
\[
\r \\rho_{\\mathrm{ss}}\r =\r \\lim_{t\o\\infty}\r \\mathrm{e}^{\\mathcal{L} t}\\rho_{0}\r =\r \\lvert \\mathrm{DNA_{B}} \\rangle\r \\langle \\mathrm{DNA_{B}} \\rvert,\r \
\]
This line is the 5 source equation retained from dialogue\_clean.md for the EID\_0169 Equation Source packet.
\end{enumerate}
% END TZP DERIVATION LAYER
